p.strong: Subsystem: Idempotency Engine for Exactly-Once Semantics
p.em: Reference Implementation: Raft/Paxos State Machine Integration

g.text: Idempotency Filter: State Machine Apply Logic

ul.li: Total SessionState: 56 bytes (fits in one 64B cache line)

g.text: ✓ Atomic: Sequence update + Command apply must be one transaction
✓ Persistent: Sessions must be included in State Machine snapshots
✓ Liveness: Session cleanup (TTL) must not prune active sequence chains
